span.p:
act
────────────────────
Execute coding strategy
on target files
captures: action_result

div.style: color: rgb(252, 252, 250) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
observe
────────────────────
Compute composite reward
TEST × 0.5 + LINT × 0.3 + LLM × 0.2
captures: observation

div.style: color: rgb(252, 252, 250) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
score
────────────────────
Convergence evaluator
target: reward_target · tolerance: ±0.05
routes: target · progress · stall · error

div.style: color: rgb(252, 252, 250) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
improve
────────────────────
Update coding strategy
based on reward + refine output
